title: Section 9
content: Where a ship has been forfeited to Government under section 8, it may be disposed of in such manner as the 1[Central Government] 2*** directs: Provided that, where the ship is sold under this section, due regard shall be had to the obligations imposed by the Treaty.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "L.G." 2. The words "subject to the control of the G.G. in C." rep by the A.O. 1937.
